name: 8q11_OPRK1_region_SD
description: 8q11.2 region around OPRK1 (kappa opioid receptor) and SNTG1 with intermediate SD content. Rare 8q11 microdeletions reported in neurodevelopmental cohorts.

architecture.internal_structure: Modest SDs around OPRK1/SNTG1; not a major NAHR hotspot but reported in DECIPHER as recurrent deletion site.
